title: Pancake recipe
instruction: Answer these questions about the pancake recipe.
context: Basic Pancake Recipe (makes 8 pancakes): 100g plain flour, 2 eggs, 300ml milk, 1 tablespoon butter, pinch of salt.

questions.question: Which word means to mix ingredients together quickly?
The recipe 'makes 8 pancakes'. What is another word for 'makes' in cooking?
You want to make 16 pancakes (double the recipe). How much flour do you need?
You want to make 4 pancakes (half the recipe). How much milk do you need?
You make the recipe 3 times. How many pancakes do you have?
